item.desc: Assembles the outputs of this project.
Assembles the main distributions
Assembles and tests this project.
Assembles and tests this project and all projects that depend on it.
Displays all buildscript dependencies declared in root project 'test'.
Build metadata json file containing information about the used Kotlin tooling
Assembles and tests this project and all projects it depends on.
Runs all checks.
Checks that Kotlin Gradle Plugin hasn't reported project configuration errors, failing otherwise. This task always runs before compileKotlin* or similar tasks.
Assembles main classes.
Deletes the build directory.
Compiles main Java source.
Compiles the compilation 'main' in target ''.
Compiles test Java source.
Compiles the compilation 'test' in target ''.
Displays the components produced by root project 'test'. [deprecated]
Displays all dependencies declared in root project 'test'.
Displays the insight into a specific dependency in root project 'test'.
Displays the dependent components of components in root project 'test'. [deprecated]
Bundles the project as a distribution.
Bundles the project as a distribution.
Displays a help message.
Initializes a new Gradle build.
Installs the project as a distribution as-is.
Assembles a jar archive containing the classes of the 'main' feature.
Displays the detected java toolchains.
Generates Javadoc API documentation for the 'main' feature.
Prints the Kotlin code for accessing the currently available project extensions and conventions.
Assembles a jar archive containing the sources of target 'kotlin'.
Displays the configuration model of root project 'test'. [deprecated]
Displays the outgoing variants of root project 'test'.
Processes main resources.
Processes test resources.
Displays the sub-projects of root project 'test'.
Displays the properties of root project 'test'.
Displays the configurations that can be resolved in root project 'test'.
Runs this project as a JVM application
Run com.test.MainKt
Run com.test.NumberKt
Run com.test.SayKt
Creates OS specific scripts to run the project as a JVM application.
Displays the tasks runnable from root project 'test'.
Runs the test suite.
Assembles test classes.
Generates or updates the Gradle Daemon JVM criteria.
Generates Gradle wrapper files.
